title: Prime Palindrome
hints: Most palindromes have an even number of digits and are divisible by 11, except 11 itself. This eliminates huge ranges.
Generate palindromes by constructing their first half and mirroring it, rather than checking every number for palindrome properties.
Only check palindromes with odd digit lengths (plus 11) for primality, as even-length palindromes > 11 are composite.
